rules.description: Avoid using explicit key versions for Key Vault used for customer-managed keys in Service Bus namespaces to enable seamless key rotation, reduce operational overhead, and prevent outages caused by expired or deleted key versions.
rules.query: mv-expand keyVault = properties.encryption.keyVaultProperties | where isnotempty(keyVault.keyVersion) | distinct id
rules.fix: used for customer-managed keys in Service Bus namespaces to enable seamless key rotation

rules.description: Set up Geo-replication on Premium Service Bus namespaces to ensure high availability and regional failover. This new feature replicates both metadata and data, helping protect against outages and disasters for mission-critical workloads.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: To enhance security and provide best-in-class encryption for your data, we require interactions with Azure services to be secured using Transport Layer Security (TLS) 1.2 or later before the retirement date.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: When running critical applications, the Service Bus premium tier offers better resource isolation at the CPU and memory level, enhancing availability. It also supports geo-replication feature enabling full recovery from regional disasters.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
